testsuite.system-out: Suite Excecution Started-Report Configuration connecting to database configure Parellel Exe close config of parellel exe launching the Browser login to VTIGER createorgwithindustryandtype:Test Execution Started createorgwithindustryandtype:Test Execution Success logout from VTIGER login to VTIGER createorgwithorgname:Test Execution Started createorgwithorgname:Test Execution Success logout from VTIGER login to VTIGER createorgwithphone:Test Execution Started createorgwithphone:Test Execution Success logout from VTIGER closing the browser disconnecting with database
